message:
test: add pure function tests for checkpoint, serve, hooks, webhook, lint

Coverage improvements across 5 packages:
- hooks: 67.1% → 80.0% (PrintPreCommitResult, getStagedFiles, ExitCode)
- webhook: 82.8% → 85.5% (dispatch types, string helpers, retry config)
- lint: 87.2% → 89.9% (WithRuleSet, WithRedactionConfig options)
- checkpoint: 14 pure functions 0%→100% (parsing, compression, diffing)
- serve: 17 pure functions 0%→100% (WS messages, RBAC, git helpers)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+package lint
+
+import (
+	"testing"
+
+	"github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ntm/internal/redaction"
+)
+
+// =============================================================================
+// WithRuleSet — 0% → 100%
+// =============================================================================
+
+func TestWithRuleSet(t *testing.T) {
+	t.Parallel()
+	rs := &RuleSet{}
+	l := New(WithRuleSet(rs))
+	if l.rules != rs {
+		t.Error("WithRuleSet did not set rules")
+	}
+}
+
+// =============================================================================
+// WithRedactionConfig — 0% → 100%
+// =============================================================================
+
+func TestWithRedactionConfig(t *testing.T) {
+	t.Parallel()
+	cfg := &redaction.Config{}
+	l := New(WithRedactionConfig(cfg))
+	if l.redactor != cfg {
+		t.Error("WithRedactionConfig did not set redactor")
+	}
+}
